text.title: Risk Register Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the risk-register methodology end-to-end.

step.name: gather-inputs
step.action: Collect every input artefact named in Prerequisites; reject incomplete sets.
step.decision-gate: If any prerequisite missing, STOP and request the missing artefact.

step.name: apply-rules
step.action: Walk rules 01-core-rules.xml top-to-bottom; record pass/fail per rule with quoted evidence.
step.decision-gate: If a rule fails, STOP and fix the underlying artefact; never silently downgrade.

step.name: produce-artefact
step.action: Generate the report artefact conforming to the schema in 02-output-contract.xml.
step.decision-gate: If the schema cannot be satisfied with available inputs, return error not guess.

step.name: self-validate
step.action: Run scripts/validate-risk-register.py against the artefact; iterate until clean.
step.decision-gate: If validator rejects after 2 attempts, escalate to human reviewer.

step.name: commit-and-route
step.action: Commit per project convention; route to downstream consumer per Related table; emit audit-log entry.
step.decision-gate: If commit blocked by CI gate, fix the root cause and re-commit; never bypass with --no-verify.
